channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Yathindra Siddaramaiah hopeful for ministerial role in Karnataka under DK Shivakumar
item.description: Yathindra Siddaramaiah, Congress MLC and son of outgoing Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, has expressed hope for a ministerial position in the forthcoming state government led by Chief Minister-...

item.title: Australian researchers train brain cells to play Doom
item.description: Australian researchers have trained lab-grown human brain cells on a silicon chip to interact with the classic video game Doom, a milestone that highlights the growing field of biological computing. T...

item.title: Wyre introduces his wife and shares family moments at Eko Dydda’s wedding
item.description: Veteran Kenyan musician Wyre made a notable appearance during gospel artist Eko Dydda’s white wedding ceremony, where he briefly introduced his wife to fellow guests. Known for keeping his family life...

item.title: Federal Government Approves 1,000 Forest Guards and Special Rescue Operation After Oyo School Abduction
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has approved urgent security measures following the abduction of pupils and teachers in Oyo State. The decision includes the recruitment of 1,000 forest guards to help secure for...

item.title: How a guitar maker’s supply chain investigation revealed connections to elephant-related environmental impacts
item.description: In this opinion piece, Bob Taylor, co-founder of Taylor Guitars, reflects on his decades-long journey in building a global musical instrument company and the unexpected environmental implications hidd...

item.title: Community in George rallies in support after death of 12-year-old Morgan Mentoor
item.description: The community in George, South Africa, has been deeply shaken following the death of 12-year-old Morgan Mentoor on 23 May 2026. Morgan, a well-known young karate champion and school learner, has been ...

item.title: Sen. Bong Go distributes assistance to indigent residents in Quezon City
item.description: Senator Bong Go extended assistance to indigent residents in Batasan Hills, Quezon City during a community outreach activity held on May 25. Working alongside Quezon City District 2 Councilor Mikey Be...

item.title: Roger Stone urges Trump to dismiss Smithsonian staff over disputed Nixon impeachment claim
item.description: A close political ally of Donald Trump, Roger Stone, has publicly called for the president to remove all staff members of the Smithsonian Institution following a controversy involving how the museum s...

item.title: Overview of the Los Angeles City Attorney and Controller Races for 2026
item.description: As Los Angeles voters head to the polls, two key city positions are drawing attention: the City Attorney and the City Controller. Incumbent City Attorney Hydee Feldstein Soto is running for a second t...

item.title: Police officer seriously injured after being struck by stolen police car in Downpatrick
item.description: A police officer in Downpatrick, County Down, was seriously injured after being struck by a stolen police car. The incident occurred early on Sunday morning at around 04:45 BST, when a vehicle failed ...

item.title: Federal government launches financial audit of Office of the Commissioner of Indigenous Languages amid allegations and complaints
item.description: The federal government has ordered a financial audit into the Office of the Commissioner of Indigenous Languages after receiving anonymous complaints regarding its operations. Canadian Heritage confir...

item.title: Ottawa Police Investigate Disappearance of Man on Paddleboard in Ottawa River
item.description: Ottawa Police are actively searching for a man who was last observed entering the Ottawa River while on a paddleboard. Authorities have not released the man's identity, but the search effort involves ...

item.title: Infrastructure as a foundation for nation-building and inclusive development in South Africa
item.description: The article argues that infrastructure development in South Africa should be understood as a central pillar of nation-building rather than merely the delivery of physical assets. The author emphasises...

item.title: Italian authorities cancel Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts due to security and public order concerns
item.description: Italian authorities have officially cancelled planned concerts by Kanye West, now known as Ye, and Travis Scott in Reggio Emilia, northern Italy, citing significant security and public order concerns....

item.title: Israeli forces advance further into Lebanon amid ongoing tensions with Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has ordered Israeli troops to move further into Lebanon as part of continued military operations against Hezbollah, the Iran-backed militant group. The direct...

item.title: Bafana Bafana’s World Cup departure delayed due to visa issues
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s planned departure for the World Cup in Mexico has been delayed due to administrative challenges, primarily involving visa approvals. The South African Football Association (Safa) was s...

item.title: SAFA visa delays disrupt Bafana Bafana’s World Cup departure plans
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup have been thrown into disarray after visa delays prevented several players and members of the technical team from travelling as scheduled to Me...

item.title: Benedix Ramos Takes on Challenging Role as a 12-Year-Old in Theater Production ‘Yemaya’
item.description: Actor Benedix Ramos has opened up about his latest theatre role in the production ‘Yemaya’, where he takes on the challenge of portraying a 12-year-old character. In an exclusive interview, Ramos shar...

item.title: Ukraine conducts strikes on Russian energy infrastructure while denying nuclear plant attack
item.description: Ukraine has intensified its drone strikes on Russian oil and gas facilities in recent months, claiming that these sites directly support Moscow's ongoing invasion, which has now lasted over four years...

item.title: Soweto Uprising legacy continues to inspire youth activism 50 years on
item.description: The article reflects on the enduring legacy of the June 16, 1976 Soweto uprising, fifty years later, and how it continues to shape youth activism in South Africa. The uprising, which began in response...
